role_summary: Defines the data schemas and structural models for an automated codebase analysis, introspection, and documentation generation pipeline.
extracted_finding: The system models a multi-stage workflow that includes directory scanning (tracking file counts, sizes, extension distributions, and manifest detection), code introspection (detecting primary programming languages and inferring project purpose with classification rationale), per-file extraction logging, documentation section aggregation, and execution tracking. It establishes a structured data flow for profiling software repositories, consolidating technical findings into markdown documentation, and monitoring pipeline metrics such as successful writes and completion status.
